ul.li: Atomicity: The ASM stub must perform a full GPR spill before entering the C ABI environment.
Memory Mapping: Offset 0x30 (RBP) and 0x38 (RSP) are critical for frame reconstruction.
Metadata: DeoptimizationData provides the mapping between JIT-allocated registers and original bytecode virtual registers.
Stack Surgery: The runtime modifies the physical stack, effectively replacing the optimized frame with multiple unoptimized interpreter frames.
Memory Overhead: Each JIT code object maintains a 4KB side-table for deopt metadata.

text.tspan: 6. Map JIT Regs to Stack Slots
Increment deopt_count; mark Code object for GC
